future_consumption.AG26Z: Manual Admin/Editor Workflow Closure should consume AG26A, AG26A routing alignment, AG26B, AG26C and AG26D audit records, then close the detailed Admin/Editor workflow chain while preserving backend deferral.
future_consumption.future_runtime_ui: Any future runtime Admin/Editor UI must consume AG26D audit findings and remain subject to separate approval for Auth/backend/runtime activation.
future_consumption.future_publishing_path: Any future publish path must preserve Admin-only final publish authority and must not allow Editor or system direct publishing.
